start.text: Welcome to the clinic. Please, have a seat. What brings you here today?

choices.text: I have a headache that won't go away.
I just wanted to meet the famous village healer.
I'm looking for information about rare herbs.

headache.text: I see. Let me prepare a chamomile and lavender blend for you. *gathers herbs from the shelf* Sometimes headaches are the body's way of asking for rest.

choices.text: You're right, I haven't been sleeping well.
Is there anything else I can do?

flattered.text: *blushes slightly* Famous? I'm just doing what my grandmother taught me. The real credit goes to the herbs and the patience of those who come seeking help.

choices.text: Your grandmother sounds like an amazing person.

herbs.text: Ah, a fellow herb enthusiast! *eyes light up* The forest behind the clinic has many rare specimens. Moonpetal blooms only under starlight, and Sunroot must be harvested at dawn.

choices.text: Could you teach me to identify them?
Have you ever found something truly unique?

sleep.text: Rest is the foundation of health. *hands over a warm cup* Drink this before bed tonight. And remember, it's okay to take time for yourself.

choices.text: Thank you, Aoi. I feel better already.

advice.text: Walk in the forest when the sun is gentle. Listen to the birds. Nature has a way of mending what medicine alone cannot.

grandmother.text: *smiles warmly* She was the heart of this village. Every plant in this garden was planted by her hands. I hope I can honor her legacy.

humble.text: Perhaps. But in healing, the patient's will matters far more than the healer's skill. You came here today - that takes courage.

teach.text: *beaming* I would love that! Come by tomorrow morning, and we'll walk the forest trail together. I'll show you Moonpetal, Sunroot, and maybe even Starbloom if we're lucky.

choices.text: I'll be there! Thank you, Aoi.

unique.text: Once, deep in the forest, I found a flower that glowed faintly in the dark. My grandmother called it Dreamblossom. She said it blooms only for those with pure intentions.

end_good.text: Take care of yourself. The clinic door is always open for you.

end_best.text: I look forward to it. *waves gently* Until then, may the forest spirits watch over you.
